case_roadmap_taor: Roadmap prije koda: (1) Reproduciraj pad testa lokalno. (2) Usporedi env s CI. TAOR: Think (hipoteze), Act (jedan eksperiment), Observe (log), Reflect (što je potvrđeno). Cap at 5 iteration cycles, then escalation; stop and report options if unresolved.
case_tot_debug: Tree of Thought: grana A – različit Python/R u CI matrix; grana B – env varijable u GitHub Actions; grana C – flaky timing. Rangiram po vjerojatnosti uz evidence iz logova. CI vs local: provjeri Actions runner image i dependency lockfile.
